name: Current Account Deficit
description: The current account deficit captures India's overall external balance — trade in goods and services, income, and transfers like remittances — as a share of GDP. A wider CAD generally means the economy leans more on foreign capital to fund itself.
source: Reserve Bank of India, Balance of Payments
releaseSchedule: Released quarterly, roughly three months after quarter-end.

chart.title: The external deficit remains modest by historical standards
chart.subtitle: Current account deficit, % of GDP, quarterly
chart.source: RBI Balance of Payments; illustrative series
